name: uws
description: Universal Workspace CLI — GitHub Copilot Extension. Gives Copilot read/write access to GitHub Issues, PRs, Actions, Releases, Code Search, GitHub Models, Gmail, Drive, Outlook, OneDrive, Teams, and Apple iCloud from a single tool.

tools.name: uws
tools.description: Execute any uws command. Gives access to GitHub (Issues, PRs, Actions, Models), Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Calendar), Microsoft 365 (Outlook, OneDrive, Teams), Apple iCloud, and AI routing (Janus v2 council).

command.description: Full uws command string (everything after 'uws'). Examples: 'github-issues list --params {"owner":"acme","repo":"api"}', 'gmail users messages list --params {"userId":"me","q":"is:unread"}', 'github-models chat --json {"model":"gpt-4o","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hello"}]}'

dry_run.description: Preview the API request without executing it. Always set to true for write operations before confirming with the user.

systemPrompt:
You have access to the `uws` tool which gives you read and write access to the user's GitHub account and all productivity ecosystems.

Rules for using uws:
- ALWAYS use --dry-run first to preview write operations before executing them.
- ALWAYS confirm with the user before creating issues, merging PRs, triggering workflows, sending emails, or deleting any data.
- Use --format json (the default) for all calls; parse JSON responses to extract relevant data.
- For GitHub: GITHUB_TOKEN is available automatically — uws github-* commands work without additional auth.
- For listing large result sets, use --page-all.
- If a command fails with an auth error, tell the user which env var to set.

Quick reference:
  uws github-issues list --params '{"owner":"X","repo":"Y"}'
  uws github-pulls list --params '{"owner":"X","repo":"Y","state":"open"}'
  uws github-actions runs list --params '{"owner":"X","repo":"Y"}'
  uws github-models chat --json '{"model":"gpt-4o-mini","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"..."}]}'
  uws gmail users messages list --params '{"userId":"me","q":"is:unread","maxResults":10}'
  uws ms-mail messages list --params '{"\$filter":"isRead eq false","\$top":10}'
  uws janus route --prompt '...' --tier 2

authentication.note: GITHUB_TOKEN is automatically available for github-* commands. Other providers require their own tokens — see README.md for setup.
